name: Mintchip Ice Cream
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup (60 mL) small semisweet chocolate chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle gelatin over boiling water and stir until dissolved.
2. Add peppermint flavoring and salt; stir well to combine.
3. Let the mixture cool completely.
4. In a separate bowl, whip the whipped topping mix, cold water, and vanilla extract until stiff peaks form.
5. Gently fold in the peppermint mixture and chocolate chips into the whipped topping mixture.
6. Pour the batter into a freezer-safe container and freeze for at least 4 hours or until firm.
Yield: 6 servings
Calories per serving: 78
